69580ffed74d0d57ccb7c693.name: 🎁 Reward: MAX Guard (Tower)
69580ffed74d0d57ccb7c693.desc:
**ETA: Q1 2026**

An upcoming exclusive tower for contributors and staff members. Shoot enemies on the track with a high pierce, burst laser rifle. Hordes will never be able to reach you again!

Performance is similar to an advance - hardcore tower.

Requires a minimum of 5 contributions to the game through the workshop portal. This reward is an additional gift ontop of your normal contribution rewards.

69581035be4b54fbb51089b8.name: 🎁 Reward: War Machine (Tower)
69581035be4b54fbb51089b8.desc:
**ETA: Q1 2026**

The highly prized War Machine tower is slated for the best contributing community members as a huge thank you from the development team. It will be able to do everything the War Machine currently does but better, stronger, and with more FLASH!

Performance will be pretty overpowered, more powerful than most hardcore towers.

Requires 15+ total contributions and review from a lead developers. This is the ultimate gift we've prepared for our most outstanding staff and contributors.
